name_en: 👄FENDI New X-Tote Medium Handbag, Houndstooth Wool material, decorated with FF embroidery. Accented with matching leather trim and a classic turnlock. Unlined, with a snap-button closure pocket and brown and gold-finished metal hardware. Equipped with two short handles for hand carry and two long handles for shoulder carry. Model: FD8374, Dimensions: 41*16*29.5cm
